VexL.AboutAuthorName: Wolf at the End of the Desert
VexL.AboutDescription: Markdown editor powered by Avalonia, Prism, and CodeWF libraries.
VexL.GuideIntroDescription: This guide quickly walks through the title-bar menus, document list, editor, preview, and status bar. Menu steps open the related menu so the entry point is clear.
VexL.GuideFileMenuDescription: The File menu handles new, open, save, export, print, and close actions. It is the main entry point for daily writing.
VexL.GuideFileOpenDescription: Open File and Open Folder load a single Markdown document or a document set. Quick Open returns to the loaded file list first.
VexL.GuideFileExportDescription: After saving the current document, use Export to generate HTML, PNG, and PDF. Word export will be added when that workflow is mature.
VexL.GuideParagraphMenuDescription: The Paragraph menu inserts headings, tables, code blocks, quotes, lists, and dividers for structured writing.
VexL.GuideFormatMenuDescription: The Format menu applies bold, italic, inline code, links, images, and Markdown cleanup.
VexL.GuideViewMenuDescription: The View menu switches the sidebar, outline, document list, source mode, line numbers, status bar, and zoom.
VexL.GuideViewOutlineMenuDescription: Clicking Outline expands the left sidebar and switches to the Outline tab. The next step shows the switched outline area.
VexL.GuideThemeMenuDescription: The Theme menu contains UI themes, Markdown typography themes, and compact layout for different writing environments.
VexL.GuideSidebarFilesDescription: The left document list shows the current file or Markdown/txt files in the opened folder, making it easy to switch documents.
VexL.GuideSidebarOutlineDescription: The Outline tab generates navigation items from Markdown headings. Click a heading to jump to its location; empty documents show an empty state.
VexL.GuideEditorDescription: The center area is the Markdown source editor with common shortcuts, context menu, find/replace, syntax highlighting, and line numbers.
VexL.GuidePreviewDescription: The right preview updates as you edit and renders with the selected Markdown typography theme.
VexL.GuideStatusBarDescription: The bottom status bar shows save state, encoding, zoom, cursor position, word count, and character count. Lightweight feedback appears on the left.
VexL.GuideHelpMenuDescription: Use the Help menu to open this guide again, or to view Changelog, Acknowledgements, and About windows.
VexL.GuideFinishDescription: You can start writing directly in the editor. Common entries are in the title-bar menus, while files and outline stay on the left.
VexL.DeletePermanentWarning: This file will be permanently deleted from disk.
VexL.ErrorMessageFileUnavailable: The file is unavailable. Check whether it exists or can be accessed.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotOpenFile: Could not open the selected file. Check the file path, permissions, or encoding.

VexL.ErrorMessageCannotOpenFolder: Could not open the selected folder. Check the path and permissions.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotOpenFolderFormat: Could not open folder {0}. Check the path and permissions.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotSaveFormat: Could not save {0}. Check write permissions and disk space.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotRenameFormat: Could not rename {0}. Check the file name, permissions, or duplicate names.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotDeleteFormat: Could not delete {0}. Check permissions or whether another app is using the file.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotExportFormat: Could not export {0}. Check the target path and permissions.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotCopyHtmlFormat: Could not copy {0} HTML. Check clipboard permissions and try again.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotPrintFormat: Could not open print preview. Check the default browser or system permissions.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotOpenLocationFormat: Could not open the file location for {0}.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotOpenHelpFormat: Could not open {0}. Check the bundled document or default browser.
VexL.ErrorMessageCannotStartNewWindow: Could not start a new Vex window.
VexL.ErrorMessageActionFailed: The current action could not be completed.

VexL.DocumentDetailFilePathMissing: The current document does not have a file path.
VexL.PrintDetailPreviewOpenFailed: The system did not start a print-preview browser.
VexL.RenameDetailFileNotFound: The original file to rename was not found.
VexL.RenameDetailDirectoryUnavailable: The original file folder could not be resolved.
VexL.RenameDetailUnsupportedExtension: Keep a supported Markdown or text extension.
VexL.HelpDetailDocumentNotFound: The bundled help document was not found.
VexL.ExportDetailPdfDocumentCreateFailed: Could not create the PDF document.
VexL.ExportDetailRenderedBitmapDecodeFailed: Could not decode the rendered Markdown bitmap.

VexL.ExportDetailSvgSurfaceCreateFailed: Could not create the SVG rendering surface.
VexL.ExportDetailSvgEncodeFailed: Could not encode the SVG picture.

VexL.StatusSaveCanceledActionIncomplete: Save canceled. Action was not completed.
